---
title: "Portfolio"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div style="max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 3rem 0;">

  <p style="color: #6b8f85; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 2.5rem;">
    A collection of selected projects spanning water resources, environmental data science,
    policy analysis, and remote sensing. Projects will include documents, GitHub repositories,
    and Quarto reports.
  </p>

  <!-- ============================================================
       HOW TO ADD A PROJECT CARD:
       Copy one of the .portfolio-card blocks below and fill in:
         - .card-type   → e.g. "GitHub Repo", "Quarto Report", "Document", "Policy Brief"
         - <h3>         → Project title
         - <p>          → Short description
         - href on .card-link → URL to doc, repo, or Quarto page
         - Link text    → "View on GitHub", "Read Report", "Download PDF", etc.
       Then remove (or keep) the empty-state block above.
  ============================================================ -->

  <div class="portfolio-grid">

    <!-- EXAMPLE CARD — uncomment and edit to add a project
    <div class="portfolio-card">
      <div class="card-type">Quarto Report</div>
      <h3>Wetland GPP Remote Sensing Model</h3>
      <p>Predictive model of gross primary production for restored wetlands on Twitchell Island using HLS remote sensing data and AmeriFlux observations.</p>
      <a class="card-link" href="#">Read Report →</a>
    </div>
    -->

    <!-- EXAMPLE CARD — uncomment and edit to add a project
    <div class="portfolio-card">
      <div class="card-type">GitHub Repo</div>
      <h3>Interactive Fen &amp; Wetland Map</h3>
      <p>R Shiny application comparing three Colorado wetland and fen datasets with polygon-level queries for transparent environmental planning.</p>
      <a class="card-link" href="https://github.com/lynetteschwanger">View on GitHub →</a>
    </div>
    -->

    <!-- EXAMPLE CARD — uncomment and edit to add a project
    <div class="portfolio-card">
      <div class="card-type">Policy Brief</div>
      <h3>Fen Protection via Regulation 87</h3>
      <p>Policy brief to Colorado's Water Quality Control Commission advocating for stronger fen protections to safeguard water quality and carbon storage.</p>
      <a class="card-link" href="#">Download PDF →</a>
    </div>
    -->

  </div>

  <div class="empty-state">
    <div class="empty-icon">🌿</div>
    <p>Projects coming soon.<br>Check back as work is added here throughout 2026.</p>
  </div>

</div>
```
